summary: The video captures a daytime urban street scene with moderate traffic. Vehicles are traveling in both directions, and there is a bus overtaking the ego-vehicle from the left side. The road appears wet, suggesting recent rainfall. Trees line the streets, and buildings are visible in the background.

events_timeline.event: A white bus overtakes the ego-vehicle from the left side, passing closely while the ego-vehicle maintains its lane.

uncertainties: Exact speed of the bus and ego-vehicle during overtaking is unclear.
Visibility of additional vehicles beyond those shown may vary.

risk_assessment.why: There is no indication of collisions, reckless driving, or other hazardous behaviors.
